name: Basic Shock Kaomoji
desc: A classic expression of sudden shock or realization.

name: Staring Disbelief Kaomoji
desc: Wide, circular eyes representing a frozen state of surprise.

name: Raised Brow Surprise Kaomoji
desc: One eye larger than the other, indicating confusion mixed with shock.

name: Gasping Shock Kaomoji
desc: A sharp intake of breath with a wide-open mouth.

name: Jaw Drop Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A character whose jaw has dropped significantly in disbelief.

name: Desperate Shock Kaomoji
desc: Raising hands as if to say 'How is this possible?'

name: Falling Over Shock Kaomoji
desc: A character physically falling over from the impact of surprising news.

name: Ooh Surprise Kaomoji
desc: An expression of being impressed and surprised simultaneously.

name: Sweating Shock Kaomoji
desc: A surprised face with a bead of sweat, indicating a stressful revelation.

name: Trembling Disbelief Kaomoji
desc: A character shaking slightly due to the magnitude of the surprise.

name: Sharp Realization Kaomoji
desc: Using a sigma symbol to represent a sharp, jagged startle.

name: Happy Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A character pleasantly surprised with a wide, open mouth.

name: Intense Outburst Shock Kaomoji
desc: A frantic expression of shock involving hand gestures.

name: Long Gasp Kaomoji
desc: A dramatic, elongated expression of 'Ehhh?!' in Japanese style shock.

name: Static Shock Kaomoji
desc: Eyes wide and fixed, unable to process what just happened.

name: Flustered Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A square-mouthed expression of being caught off guard.

name: Mesmerized Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Surprise mixed with intense focus or wonder.

name: Cute Alert Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A small, cute character having a major 'aha!' moment.

name: Blank Shock Kaomoji
desc: A neutral but wide-eyed stare indicating a 'mind blown' state.

name: Shivering Shock Kaomoji
desc: Showing a character physically vibrating from a terrifying surprise.

name: Side Look Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Glancing sideways in shock after noticing something unexpected.

name: Polite Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A small, contained expression of being startled.

name: Joyful Startle Kaomoji
desc: Being surprised by something wonderful or a celebration.

name: Cat Face Shock Kaomoji
desc: A cute cat-like face showing sudden alertness.

name: Blushing Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Being surprised by a compliment or romantic gesture.

name: Deadpan Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A minimalist face representing total, unmoving shock.

name: Sad Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A character shocked by bad news, on the verge of tears.

name: Reaching Shock Kaomoji
desc: Reaching out in disbelief as if to touch the surprising object.

name: Dazed Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Wandering around in a daze after a shocking event.

name: Angry Shock Kaomoji
desc: Being surprised by something that makes the character furious.

name: Hasty Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Falling back or moving away quickly in response to a scare.

name: Wide Eyed Discovery Kaomoji
desc: Finding something unexpected and staring with fascination.

name: Drooling Shock Kaomoji
desc: Being so surprised that the character has lost all motor control.

name: Terrified Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A face turning pale from a scary or ghostly surprise.

name: Skeptical Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Being surprised by something that seems hard to believe.

name: Small Mouth Gasp Kaomoji
desc: A subtle, soft-spoken gasp of astonishment.

name: Topsy Turvy Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A character whose world has been turned upside down by a surprise.

name: Pale Shock Kaomoji
desc: Using vertical lines to represent a face turning white from shock.

name: Triple Exclamation Shock Kaomoji
desc: Emphasizing extreme surprise with three exclamation marks.

name: Floral Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A decorative, cute character expressing high shock.

name: Clueless Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Being surprised while also being completely confused about what happened.

name: Minimal One Eye Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A classic internet face for the 'wait, what?' reaction.

name: Bullseye Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Perfectly round eyes and mouth indicating a direct hit of shock.

name: Sudden Realization Kaomoji
desc: The moment something finally clicks, and it is surprising.

name: Running Away Shock Kaomoji
desc: A character running away in a panic after a surprise.

name: Silent Observation Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Staring intensely at something surprising while remaining quiet.

name: Waving Arms Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Flailing in the air due to a sudden scare.

name: Wait A Minute Shock Kaomoji
desc: Waving a hand to pause everything because of a surprising fact.

name: Aggressive Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A menacing face reacting to a highly unpleasant surprise.

name: Wild Joy Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A wide, slightly crazy-eyed look of happy surprise.

name: Embarrassed Startle Kaomoji
desc: Being startled by something that also makes the character shy.

name: Single Eye Focus Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A character looking through a lens or focused on one shocking detail.

name: Nauseous Shock Kaomoji
desc: A character who feels sick because of a surprising revelation.

name: Sweat Drop Disbelief Kaomoji
desc: Classic anime-style shock with a visible sweat drop.

name: Hands Up Surprise Kaomoji
desc: The universal gesture for 'Whoa!' or 'I didn't expect that!'

name: Irritated Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A character surprised by someone's audacity or annoying behavior.

name: Lateral Shock Kaomoji
desc: A sharp shock directed toward the right side.

name: Exhausted Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Being so tired that a surprise just leaves the character dazed.

name: Tripping Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A character stumbling backward in shock.

name: Owl Eyes Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Large, dark pupils showing intense interest and surprise.

name: Whiskered Shock Kaomoji
desc: A character with lines suggesting whiskers or a fuzzy reaction to shock.

name: Trembling Fear Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Shaking violently because of a scary surprise.

name: Villainous Surprise Kaomoji
desc: An angry, dark character being caught off guard.

name: Cool Guy Shock Kaomoji
desc: A character dropping their cigarette in shock.

name: Small Animal Shock Kaomoji
desc: A tiny creature-like face showing great astonishment.

name: Startled Leap Kaomoji
desc: Jumping into the air after being surprised.

name: Max Volume Shock Kaomoji
desc: A face yelling at the top of its lungs in surprise.

name: Cold Sweat Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Multiple sweat marks and shaking to show deep distress and surprise.

name: Diamond Mouth Surprise Kaomoji
desc: An angular mouth shape showing a sharp gasp.

name: Cat Alert Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A cat ears effect showing sudden focus on a surprise.

name: Square Mouth Shock Kaomoji
desc: A wide, boxy mouth showing a massive intake of air.

name: Stressed Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Feeling the pressure after a surprising turn of events.

name: Loud Protest Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Surprised and yelling 'No way!' or 'What!'

name: Ghostly Shock Kaomoji
desc: A character looking like they have seen a ghost.

name: Dizzy Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Being so surprised it makes the character feel lightheaded.

name: Sharp Gasp Kaomoji
desc: A quick and loud gasp of air.

name: Intense Vibration Shock Kaomoji
desc: Maximum shaking to represent overwhelming surprise.

name: Over The Shoulder Shock Kaomoji
desc: Looking back in surprise at something behind the character.

name: Shaking Pale Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Pale face and shaking lines for a scary shock.

name: Mean Character Surprise Kaomoji
desc: An aggressive-looking face being caught by surprise.

name: Angry Disbelief Kaomoji
desc: Reacting to a surprise with a mix of anger and shock.

name: Pale Face Shock Kaomoji
desc: A face turning white with shock lines.

name: Side Eye Shock Kaomoji
desc: Glancing to the side with wide eyes in surprise.

name: Zombified Shock Kaomoji
desc: A blank, dead-eyed expression after a massive surprise.

name: Squinting Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Trying to see something surprising more clearly.

name: Standard Shock Kaomoji
desc: The most versatile and common shock kaomoji.

name: Full Body Shiver Shock Kaomoji
desc: Shaking from head to toe in surprise.

name: Side Glance Shock Kaomoji
desc: A character noticing something surprising out of the corner of their eye.

name: Intense Pale Shock Kaomoji
desc: Maximum paleness and shaking for a surprise.

name: Tough Guy Shock Kaomoji
desc: A tough character being genuinely surprised.

name: Grumpy Surprise Kaomoji
desc: A grumpy face being forced to react to a surprise.

name: Drained Shock Kaomoji
desc: A character feeling drained of energy after a surprise.

name: Single Eye Shock Kaomoji
desc: A character focused on a single shocking detail.

name: Empty Shock Kaomoji
desc: Feeling empty and hollow after a shocking event.

name: Focused Surprise Kaomoji
desc: Intensely focused on something surprising.

name: Quick Shock Kaomoji
desc: A rapid and sharp expression of shock.

name: Heavy Shiver Shock Kaomoji
desc: Shaking heavily from a massive surprise.

name: Look Back Shock Kaomoji
desc: Looking back in shock at what just happened.

name: Frightened Shock Kaomoji
desc: A character frightened by a sudden surprise.

name: Angry Startle Kaomoji
desc: An angry character being startled.

name: Annoyed Shock Kaomoji
desc: Being surprised by something annoying.

name: Whited Out Shock Kaomoji
desc: A character whose face has gone completely white from shock.

name: Staring Shock Kaomoji
desc: Staring in surprise at something unusual.

name: Dead Eyes Shock Kaomoji
desc: Eyes wide but lifeless after a major shock.

name: Dazed Surprise Kaomoji-Alt
desc: Feeling dazed after a surprising realization.

name: Abrupt Shock Kaomoji
desc: A very abrupt and sudden shock.

desc: Maximum shaking to represent a huge surprise.
